description: PDF Blocks is a hosted service for processing PDF documents, including merging files, adding or removing passwords and restrictions, watermarking, and extracting or rotating pages. It offers the service through its own API as well as no-code integrations such as Power Automate and Zapier.
summary: PDF Blocks exposes one documented REST API for PDF-processing operations, with published OpenAPI specs and API-key authentication via `X-Api-Key` on global or EU base URLs.
